description: Extract quadratic equation coefficients (a, b, c) and root type from natural language text using regex patterns and text parsing

inputs.name: text
inputs.description: Natural language text containing quadratic equation coefficients to extract (e.g. 'a = 3, b = -11, c = -4')

output.description: Returns extracted coefficients and parameters with keys: a (integer coefficient of squared term), b (integer coefficient of linear term), c (integer constant term), root_type (string indicating 'real' or 'all' roots)

workflow_spec.name: Quadratic Function Call Generator
workflow_spec.description: Extracts quadratic equation coefficients from natural language and generates function call JSON for solving the equation
